name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
StateSpace == [p \in 1..N |-> state[p] \in {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
        /\ N > 0
        /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = idle

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = \*]
          /\ turn' = \*  \* turn may change arbitrarily

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBy, chosenBallot, chosenByBallot, chosenByValue, chosenByBallotValue

Init == /\ acceptors = <<>>
       /\ proposers = <<>>
       /\ promises = <<>>
       /\ accepts = <<>>
       /\ chosen = <<>>
       /\ chosenBy = <<>>
       /\ chosenBallot = <<>>
       /\ chosenByBallot = <<>>
       /\ chosenByValue = <<>>
       /\ chosenByBallotValue = <<>>

Next == /\ acceptors' = acceptors
       /\ proposers' = proposers
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ accepts' = accepts
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy
       /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
       /\ chosenByBallot' = chosenByBallot
       /\ chosenByValue' = chosenByValue
       /\ chosenByBallotValue' = chosenByBallotValue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBy, chosenBallot, chosenByBallot, chosenByValue, chosenByBallotValue>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks, chunks, file

Init ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> SubSeq(file, i, CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin sent_chunks
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, i)
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
    \/ \E i \in sent_chunks :
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, retransmit_count[i] + 1)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks>>
